changeSet.author: nexus-piwya.1

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_index i JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = i.indexrelid JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname = 'nexus' AND c.relname = 'idx_chunks_384_tenant_chash' AND i.indisvalid

changeSet.comment: (tenant_id, chash) probe index on chunks_384 — the PK leads with collection, a chash-only probe cannot use it (RDR-187 step 1)
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_chunks_384_tenant_chash ON nexus.chunks_384 (tenant_id, chash);

changeSet.author: nexus-piwya.1

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_index i JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = i.indexrelid JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname = 'nexus' AND c.relname = 'idx_chunks_768_tenant_chash' AND i.indisvalid

changeSet.comment: (tenant_id, chash) probe index on chunks_768 — the PK leads with collection, a chash-only probe cannot use it (RDR-187 step 1)
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_chunks_768_tenant_chash ON nexus.chunks_768 (tenant_id, chash);

changeSet.author: nexus-piwya.1

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_index i JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = i.indexrelid JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname = 'nexus' AND c.relname = 'idx_chunks_1024_tenant_chash' AND i.indisvalid

changeSet.comment: (tenant_id, chash) probe index on chunks_1024 — the PK leads with collection, a chash-only probe cannot use it (RDR-187 step 1)
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_chunks_1024_tenant_chash ON nexus.chunks_1024 (tenant_id, chash);
